---
name: " Bug Report"
about: Report a bug or issue to help improve SuperBrowser
title: "[BUG] - Short description of the issue"
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

###  Description
<!-- Just say exactly what is broken right now without overcomplicating it -->
A clear and concise description of what the bug is. 

###  Steps to Reproduce
<!-- Commands needed to make the bug happen again. -->
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Switch mode to '....'
4. See error

###  Expected Behavior
<!-- What the correct, working behavior should look like. -->
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

###  Screenshots / Logs
<!-- Just drop a screenshot or paste the red error text from your terminal. -->
If applicable, add screenshots, browser console logs, or backend FastAPI server logs to help explain your problem.

###  Environment Context
<!-- What environment are you running? Fill in your versions below. -->
- **OS:** [e.g. Windows 11, macOS, Ubuntu]
- **Browser:** [e.g. Chrome, Safari]
- **Node.js Version:** [if applicable]
- **Python Version:** [if applicable]

###  Additional context
<!-- For anything else not covered above -->
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., specific search queries or AI personas like Claude/Gemini where this happened).
